category_sources: source_facts.description says lavat is a lava lamp simulation using metaballs in the terminal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives lavat; source_facts.homepage is the official repository with the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies terminal lava lamp simulation using metaballs; source_facts.executables lists the lavat CLI.
